testcase.name: testPaymentDelegateSuccessfulPath
testcase.system-out: 21:33:43.652 [main] INFO com.foodorder.order.workflow.delegate.PaymentDelegate -- [OrderService] Order #456 - Payment Processing via null

testcase.name: testDeliveryDelegate
testcase.system-out: 21:33:43.736 [main] INFO com.foodorder.order.workflow.delegate.DeliveryDelegate -- [OrderService] Order #123 - Out for Delivery. Triggering Courier Rider Assignment via null 21:33:43.738 [main] INFO com.foodorder.order.workflow.delegate.DeliveryDelegate -- [OrderService] Courier assigned for Order #123. Rider: Courier-1, Status: ASSIGNED

testcase.name: testPaymentDelegateFailedPath
testcase.system-out: 21:33:43.749 [main] INFO com.foodorder.order.workflow.delegate.PaymentDelegate -- [OrderService] Order #789 - Payment Processing via null

testcase.name: testConsumerTriggersWorkflowStarter
testcase.system-out: [ActiveMQ Consumer] Message Received for Order #123 21:33:43.764 [main] INFO com.foodorder.order.messaging.OrderCreatedConsumer -- [OrderService] Order #123 - Workflow started 21:33:43.764 [main] INFO com.foodorder.order.workflow.WorkflowStarter -- [OrderService] Order #123 - Camunda Workflow started with Instance ID: test-process-instance-id [Camunda] Workflow Started for Order #123

testcase.name: testKitchenDelegate
testcase.system-out: 21:33:43.775 [main] INFO com.foodorder.order.workflow.delegate.KitchenDelegate -- [OrderService] Order #123 - Kitchen Preparation via null
